_comment: Copy to ~/.config/elnora-merit/docsync.json (gitignored) and edit. Every field is optional; with no config the tool scans ~/Downloads. Full guide: docs/document-sync.md.
_sources: A `dir` source scans a local folder for PDFs. A `command` source runs a shell command that fetches from Gmail/Drive/a scanner/etc. WITH YOUR OWN AUTH (outside this repo), writes each file locally, and prints one JSON object per line: {"path":"/abs/file.pdf","text":"Acme Taxi 42.50 2026-03-15","amounts":[42.50],"dates":["2026-03-15"]}
_gmail_drive: The bundled adapter at adapters/gmail-drive-gw.mjs pulls receipts straight from Gmail + Drive using the elnora-google-workspace `gw` CLI (install that plugin and run `gw auth` once). Adjust the search via env: DOCSYNC_GMAIL_QUERY, DOCSYNC_DRIVE_FOLDER. Replace the path below with your checkout.
_webhookUrl: Slack-compatible incoming webhook for the digest. Prefer the MERIT_DOCSYNC_WEBHOOK env var over storing the secret here. Delete this key (or leave it empty) if you use notifyCommand or --quiet.
_notifyCommand: Alternative to webhookUrl: a shell command that receives the digest text on stdin. Leave empty to disable.
